data.title: RED: Create tests for emit-protocol-review-result.sh
data.description:
## Description

Create tests/scripts/test-emit-protocol-review-result.sh with tests for the plan/fidelity review event wrapper. Tests call emit-protocol-review-result.sh which does not exist yet — all should FAIL (RED).

Uses WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR override and mktemp -d fixtures.

Test functions (5):
- test_emit_protocol_review_all_fields: fixture review-protocol-output.json + CLI args (--review-type=implementation-plan --pass-fail=passed --revision-cycles=1) → valid JSONL with all fields
- test_emit_protocol_review_brainstorm_fidelity: --review-type=brainstorm-fidelity → review_type field correct
- test_emit_protocol_review_missing_output_fails: no review-protocol-output.json → non-zero exit
- test_emit_protocol_review_finding_counts: fixture with 2 critical + 1 minor findings → finding_counts_by_severity.critical=2, minor=1
- test_emit_protocol_review_emit_failure_graceful: stub emit-review-event.sh to fail → script logs warning, returns 0

## TDD Requirement
RED — emit-protocol-review-result.sh does not exist.

## Test Approach
Create fixture review-protocol-output.json with perspectives/dimensions/scores/findings. Call wrapper with CLI args. Parse JSONL output with python3 json.loads and assert field values.

## Files to Modify
- tests/scripts/test-emit-protocol-review-result.sh (create)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file syntactically valid
  Verify: bash -n tests/scripts/test-emit-protocol-review-result.sh
- [ ] 5+ test functions
  Verify: grep -c "^test_emit_protocol_review" tests/scripts/test-emit-protocol-review-result.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 5)}'
